word: G548 - ἄπειμι - ápeimi - ap'-i-mee - Be absent

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἄπειμι

- Transliteration: Apeimi

- Phonetic: ap'-i-mee

- Definition:

1. to go away, depart

- Origin: from G575 and G1510

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and G1510; to be away: - be absent. Compare G549.
